steps.title: Set up the ratio
steps.content:
The problem asks for the ratio of red cards to blue cards.
Shaquan has 7 red cards and 28 blue cards.
The ratio is 7 to 28.

steps.title: Simplify the ratio
steps.content:
Find the greatest common divisor (GCD) of 7 and 28. Notice that $28 = 7 \times 4$, so 7 is a common factor.
Divide both parts by 7:
$$\frac{7 \div 7}{28 \div 7} = \frac{1}{4}$$
The simplified ratio is 1 to 4. That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
